case_title: KIN WAH KUNG VS. JOSEPH GROVER CRESALIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUNG, KIN WAH AS TO DEFENDANT ANDRY, KAVANTE MARCHE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (**SEE SIGNATURE** ON GREEN RETURN RECEIPT CARD) SERVED DEC-09-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CRESALIA, JOSEPH GROVER
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KUNG, KIN WAH AS TO DEFENDANT CRESALIA, JOSEPH GROVER
COPYING FEES (18 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KUNG, KIN WAH
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $181.36 FILED BY KUNG, KIN WAH AS TO DEFENDANT CRESALIA, JOSEPH GROVER ANDRY, KAVANTE MARCHE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 12/15/21. SC-100 MAILED CERTIFIED TO KAVANTE ANDRY- NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF KIN WAH KUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH GROVER CRESALIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAVANTE MARCHE ANDRY IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR DEFENDANT KAVANTE MARCHE ANDRY, AND PLAINTIFF DISMISSES HIS CASE AGANIST THE UNSERVED DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
